The '''CZ-28 Flamestrike''' was manufactured by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]], who bought the designs for the [[Model CR-28 flame cannon|CR-28 flame cannon]] from [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] and sold it under the new name.

[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] weapons designers later refashioned the weapon for use on [[Cloud car/Legends|cloud cars]] and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles. In combat against ground combatants, this vehicle-mounted weapon would have caused heavy losses for the enemy. When [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] found out about this development, they immediately dispatched a strike team to attack the weapons factory and prevent production of the weapon.<ref name="SWG:Ifmf">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal|Rebel|Imperial flamer munitions factory}}</ref>
